title: Emmanuel Macron becomes president of France
fact: Emmanuel Jean-Michel Frédéric Macron is a French politician who has served as President of France and Co-Prince of Andorra since 2017.

title: Charles de Gaulle becomes president of France
fact: Charles André Joseph Marie de Gaulle was a French general and statesman who led the Free French Forces against Nazi Germany and Vichy France in World War II and chaired the Provisional Government of the French Republic from 1944 to 1946 to restore democracy in France.

title: Napoleon III becomes president of France
fact: Napoleon III was President of France from 1848 to 1852 and then Emperor of the French from 1852 until his deposition in 1870.

title: Nicolas Sarkozy becomes president of France
fact: Nicolas Paul Stéphane Sarközy de Nagy-Bocsa is a French former politician who served as President of France from 2007 to 2012.

title: François Mitterrand becomes president of France
fact: François Maurice Adrien Marie Mitterrand was President of France from 1981 to 1995.

title: Jacques Chirac becomes president of France
fact: Jacques René Chirac was a French politician who served as President of France from 1995 to 2007.

title: François Hollande becomes president of France
fact: François Gérard Georges Nicolas Hollande is a French politician who served as President of France and Co-Prince of Andorra from 2012 to 2017.

title: Valéry Giscard d'Estaing becomes president of France
fact: Valéry René Marie Georges Giscard d'Estaing, also known as simply Giscard or VGE, was President of France from 1974 to 1981.

title: Georges Pompidou becomes president of France
fact: Georges Jean Raymond Pompidou was a French politician who served as President of France from 1969 until his death in 1974.

title: Adolphe Thiers becomes president of France
fact: Marie Joseph Louis Adolphe Thiers was a French statesman and historian who served as President of France from 1871 to 1873.

title: Raymond Poincaré becomes president of France
fact: Raymond Nicolas Landry Poincaré was a French statesman who served as President of France from 1913 to 1920, and three times as Prime Minister of France.

title: Patrice de MacMahon becomes president of France
fact: Marie Edme Patrice Maurice de MacMahon, marquis de MacMahon, duc de Magenta, was a French general and politician who served as President of France from 1873 to 1879.

title: René Coty becomes president of France
fact: Gustave Jules René Coty was President of France from 1954 to 1959.

title: Albert François Lebrun becomes president of France
fact: Albert François Lebrun was a French politician who served as President of France from 1932 to 1940.

title: Félix Faure becomes president of France
fact: Félix François Faure was President of France from 1895 until his death in 1899.

title: Vincent Auriol becomes president of France
fact: Vincent Jules Auriol was a French politician who served as President of France from 1947 to 1954.

title: Paul Doumer becomes president of France
fact: Joseph Athanase Doumer, commonly known as Paul Doumer, was a French politician who served as the President of France from June 1931 until his assassination in May 1932.

title: Jules Grévy becomes president of France
fact: François Judith Paul Grévy, known as Jules Grévy, was a French lawyer and politician who served as President of France from 1879 to 1887.

title: Alexandre Millerand becomes president of France
fact: Alexandre Millerand was a French politician who served as President of France from 1920 to 1924, having previously served as Prime Minister of France earlier in 1920.

title: Sadi Carnot becomes president of France
fact: Marie François Sadi Carnot was a French statesman who served as President of France from 1887 until his assassination in 1894.

title: Alain Poher becomes president of France
fact: Alain Émile Louis Marie Poher was a French politician who served as President of the Senate from 1968 to 1992.

title: Gaston Doumergue becomes president of France
fact: Pierre Paul Henri Gaston Doumergue was a French politician who served as President of France from 1924 to 1931.

title: Émile Loubet becomes president of France
fact: Émile François Loubet was the 45th Prime Minister of France from February to December 1892 and later President of France from 1899 to 1906.

title: Jean Casimir-Perier becomes president of France
fact: Jean Paul Pierre Casimir-Perier was a French politician who served as President of France from June 1894 to January 1895.

title: Paul Deschanel becomes president of France
fact: Paul Eugène Louis Deschanel was a French politician who served as President of France from 18 February to 21 September 1920.

title: Louis-Eugène Cavaignac becomes president of France
fact: Louis-Eugène Cavaignac was a French general and politician who served as head of the executive power of France from June to December 1848, during the French Second Republic.

title: Armand Fallières becomes president of France
fact: Clément Armand Fallières was a French statesman who was President of France from 1906 to 1913.

title: Georges Bidault becomes president of France
fact: Georges-Augustin Bidault was a French politician.

title: Louis Jules Trochu becomes president of France
fact: Louis-Jules Trochu was a French military leader and politician.
